title: How To Manually Open Rear Hatch Liftgate Door With A Dead Battery On 2010-2015 Lexus RX350 RX450h
description: Manually open the rear power hatch from inside when the battery is dead on 2010-2015 Lexus RX 350 and RX 450h models.
tips: Use the physical key from the key fob to manually unlock the doors when the battery is dead.
Fold the rear seat down to crawl into the hatch area and access the manual release.
A trim tool, key, credit card or similar flat object can be used to pop off the small cover at the bottom center of the hatch interior.
The manual release lever behind the cover only needs to be pulled by hand — no tools required.
